objects.name: Apple security advisory (AV26-446)
objects.description: Serial number: AV26-446 Date: May 11, 2026 On May 11, 2026, Apple published a security update to address vulnerabilities in the following products: iOS – versions prior to 26.5 iPadOS – versions prior to 26.5 iOS – versions prior to 18.7.9 iPadOS – versions prior to 18.7.9 iPadOS – versions prior to 17.7.11 iOS – versions prior to 16.7.16 iPadOS – versions prior to 16.7.16 iOS – versions prior to 15.8.8 iPadOS – versions prior to 15.8.8 macOS Tahoe –...
